analyze_data_for_flow.description_issues: FP on gq-067 (3 rows): description triggers on 'what's the best way to visualize' without a minimum row threshold. Small datasets match the trigger language even though Flow adds no value. Add: 'NOT useful for datasets under ~20 rows where 2D charts suffice.'

suggest_flow_visualization.description_issues: FN on gq-055: 'map spatially' is clear geographic intent, but I prioritized geo_enhance + extraction over suggestion. Description could add: 'INVOKE when spatial/geographic mapping decisions need template resolution.'

get_flow_template.description_issues: FN on gq-050: 'animated time progression with comparison' doesn't strongly trigger template retrieval. The suggest tool would lead there, but the gold expects both. Description could add: 'INVOKE when user mentions a specific visualization mode that needs setup instructions.'

recommendations.analyze_data_for_flow: Add explicit minimum threshold: 'NOT for datasets under ~20 rows where 2D charts communicate adequately.' This prevents false positives on tiny dataset queries (gq-067).
recommendations.get_flow_template: Strengthen trigger for multi-tool pipeline queries. When user describes a visualization that implies a specific template + time series animation, the template tool should be invoked alongside. Add: 'INVOKE when the query implies a specific Flow rendering mode that needs setup configuration, even in pipeline contexts.'
recommendations.suggest_flow_visualization: Add geographic/spatial mapping to triggers: 'User wants to map data spatially and needs template resolution for geographic visualization.' Currently missing on queries that strongly imply geographic mapping (gq-055).
recommendations.flow_merge_datasets: No gold queries test this tool. Add gold queries like: 'I have sales data from 3 regions in separate CSVs, combine them for one visualization.' Current coverage gap.
recommendations.flow_anomaly_detect: No gold queries test this tool. Add gold queries like: 'Find the outliers in my sensor data and highlight them in the visualization.' Current coverage gap.
recommendations.flow_nlp_to_viz: No gold queries test this tool. Add gold queries like: 'Show me a social network of tech companies' (with no data provided). Current coverage gap.
recommendations.flow_export_formats: No gold queries test this tool. Add gold queries like: 'Export this visualization as a standalone HTML page I can share.' Current coverage gap.
recommendations.flow_geo_enhance: Only tested once in gold queries (gq-055). Add more: 'My CSV has city names but no coordinates, add lat/long for mapping.' Current single-test coverage is fragile.
